titles.title: I Am Blessed, I Am Blessed

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thru the sunshine and rain Even sorrow and pain Jesus still is my comfort and guide Yes His love comforts me And His grace has set me free And someday I shall stand by his side.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am blessed, I am blessed Everyday of my life I am blessed From I wake up in the morning 'Til I lay my head to rest I am blessed, I am blessed (You are blessed, you are blessed…) (We are blessed, we are blessed…)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I have shoes on my feet I have plenty to eat And a home in heaven by and by Brothers and sisters on this earth They are mine by my new birth And we'll shall share in that home beyond the sky.
